summary: 5+ years building high-performance data infrastructure at scale. Expert in Python, Spark, AWS/Azure, and cloud-native ETL pipelines — delivering data that powers business decisions for healthcare and financial services.

highlights.label: Faster pipeline runtimes via dbt, query tuning & partitioning
Reduction in data defects through automated QA frameworks
Healthcare records processed daily at ZS
Pipeline reliability maintained across production environments
Improved query performance through advanced data modeling
Faster development via reusable PySpark frameworks

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and deployed scalable batch pipelines using Python, SQL, Airflow, and AWS/Azure, processing 12M+ healthcare records daily.
Integrated claims, EMR, patient, and sales datasets into star/snowflake data models, enabling reliable longitudinal patient analytics.
Built automated data quality frameworks with anomaly detection, cutting data defects by ~30%.
Improved ETL/ELT pipelines with dbt, query tuning, and partitioning — reducing runtimes by ~40%.
Maintained 99.9% pipeline reliability; implemented PHI/PII governance and audit logging on AWS and Azure.
Partnered with consultants, data scientists, and client stakeholders to translate business needs into scalable data solutions.
Authored technical documentation, runbooks, and data dictionaries, improving knowledge sharing and onboarding.

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Built and optimized scalable data pipelines in Python, SQL, and Spark — reducing processing time by 40% and supporting 10M+ records/day.
Leveraged AWS (S3, Glue), Azure (ADLS, Databricks, ADF), and Snowflake to build cost-effective cloud ETL/ELT workflows.
Implemented data modeling and transformation logic, improving query performance by 25–30%.
Enforced data quality and reconciliation checks, reducing inconsistencies by 35% across critical datasets.
Developed reusable PySpark frameworks and SQL components, boosting development efficiency by 20%.
Maintained full compliance with financial data governance and security standards — zero audit findings.
Mentored junior engineers and conducted code reviews, leading to higher code quality and faster pipeline delivery.

experience.title: Junior Data Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained ETL pipelines using Python and SQL, processing 5M+ records daily for healthcare analytics.
Optimized batch workflows, improving pipeline execution time by 20–25% through query optimization.
Performed data validation and quality checks, reducing production data defects by 30%.
Supported production deployments and maintained 99%+ pipeline uptime.
Built scalable pipelines using Postgres, cloud-based platforms, and Spark — increasing data processing speed by 30%.

fraud-detection-system.custom_description: End-to-end real-time fraud detection with Kafka, Spark Structured Streaming, scikit-learn, and Streamlit — processing live card transactions through an ML model with a real-time alert dashboard.
highlights: Streaming architecture with Kafka + Spark Structured Streaming for real-time transaction scoring
Weighted logistic regression serialized as JSON for portable, pickle-free inference across Spark workers
MinIO as S3-compatible local data lake; optional Snowflake micro-batch sink for warehouse analytics
Live Streamlit dashboard showing KPIs, fraud alerts, and risk trend visualizations

video-streaming-pipeline.custom_description: Large-scale data pipeline for ingesting, processing, and analyzing video streaming event data — covering real-time ingestion, batch processing, and analytics.
